title: Tax Preparers
description: Prepare tax returns for individuals or small businesses.

tasks.text: Compute taxes owed or overpaid, using adding machines or personal computers, and complete entries on forms, following tax form instructions and tax tables.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Use all appropriate adjustments, deductions, and credits to keep clients' taxes to a minimum.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Furnish taxpayers with sufficient information and advice to ensure correct tax form completion.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Interview clients to obtain additional information on taxable income and deductible expenses and allowances.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare or assist in preparing simple to complex tax returns for individuals or small businesses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review financial records, such as income statements and documentation of expenditures to determine forms needed to prepare tax returns.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Check data input or verify totals on forms prepared by others to detect errors in arithmetic, data entry, or procedures.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Explain federal and state tax laws to individuals and companies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Answer questions and provide future tax planning to clients.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Consult tax law handbooks or bulletins to determine procedures for preparation of atypical returns.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Calculate form preparation fees according to return complexity and processing time required.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
